subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him. He giveth life and causeth death, then causeth death and giveth life. Verily, He is the Sovereign over all things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو یحیی و یمیت ثم یمیت و یحیی انه لهو الحاکم علی ما
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual transformation, @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations
